validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.notes: uv at ~/.local/bin/uv (not on PATH, not python3.12 -m uv). Baseline 2026-05-04: 106 failed (marketplace drift), 6500 passed. PRs #1029 and #1059 closed by maintainer without merging on 2026-05-03.

coverage_baseline.notes: Marketplace tests failing: RefResolver/MarketplacePublisher attrs missing after API refactor. Doctor module restructure. policy_status ANSI (7), runtime_factory (4), orphan_announce_parity (2) also failing.

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions.
maintainer_preferences: PRs #1029 (ANSI fix) and #1059 (uninstall engine tests) were closed without merging on 2026-05-03. Be more selective about submitting PRs.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.
86+ tests failing after marketplace API refactor. RefResolver/MarketplacePublisher attrs missing on click commands. Doctor module restructure. Maintainer may be aware.
PR submitted and closed by maintainer.

Task3: Fix logic-replay anti-pattern in TestExplicitTargetDirCreation (#768). 3 new phase-level tests in test_targets_phase.py. Task5: Commented on #768. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
